creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
I wonder if we can use rustup [1] as the bootstrap version of rustc and cargo instead of relying on a real up-to-date bootstrap. rustup provides prebuilt snapshots of stable and nightly channels for FreeBSD/amd64.

At the time of this writing, the latest snapshot was built on 2016-05-31. Rust 1.9.0 and Cargo 0.10.0 are available in the stable channel.

I'm currently trying to build devel/cargo updated to 0.10.0 with --local-cargo pointing to rustup's install.

[1] https://www.rustup.rs/
